market_context: Constructive macro tape: Fed held rates steady 06-17 with retail sales resilient (Benzinga 'Fed Holds Rates Steady; Retail Sales Remain Resilient'); Dow hit record highs as oil dropped to $77 (06-16) after a US-Iran deal reopened Hormuz and sank oil 5% (06-15). AI-led bull market persists, but stock-level news is mixed: Apple flags a memory-chip cost 'flood', Trump pushes US chip manufacturing (Intel/Apple/Nvidia). Portfolio is 100% cash (no holdings per data/2026-06-18/_manifest.json), so no holdings-news sweep was required; I did verify JNJ has no fresh adverse litigation/FDA news before proposing a buy. Default is hold across the tech names; the one action is a small JNJ buy on a fresh, falsifiable clinical catalyst.

signals.thesis: Fresh clinical catalyst: 06-15 TALVEY+DARZALEX FASPRO Phase 3 hit up to 81% PFS / 89% OS at 24 months (first GPRC5D bispecific combo with superior PFS in multiple myeloma); plus 06-15 $1B+ Florida vision investment and 06-11 IMAAVY rare-disease win. Beta 0.256; close 233.92 holds above the 230 falsification line. Talc litigation a known overhang, no new escalation 06-18. Falsified if close < 230 or an oncology/FDA/talc setback.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-15: Johnson & Johnson's TALVEY Plus DARZALEX FASPRO Delivers Up To 81% PFS And 89% OS At 24 Months In First Phase 3 To Show Superior PFS For GPRC5D Bispecific Combination In Multiple Myeloma
Benzinga 2026-06-15: Johnson & Johnson Plans $1B+ Florida Investment To Strengthen Its Vision Operations
Benzinga 2026-06-11: Johnson & Johnson Hits Target With IMAAVY In Rare Blood Disorder
Web check 2026-06-18 (talcum powder lawsuit updates): litigation ongoing, no new escalation; J&J defending claims in court

signals.thesis: Margin pressure vs manufacturing tailwind: 06-17 Tim Cook says Apple will raise prices on a memory-chip crunch he calls 'a 100-year flood' (WSJ Exclusive), a clear cost/margin negative, while 06-18 Trump confirms Apple agreed to build chips with Intel in the US. Close 296.07 sits near the low end of the 30-day range (287-315). No clean falsifiable edge; hold. Re-evaluate on demand data or a break below 287.
